summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MC PowerPoint generation updates and full app functionality. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/rounds/{id}/generate for MC rounds returns valid .pptx file
Generated MC PPTX has exactly 14 slides (verified by counting slide XML files)
Generated REG PPTX has exactly 14 slides (baseline comparison)
MC form checkboxes work for selecting correct answer options A/B/C/D
Can switch between different correct answers in MC form
Dashboard loads correctly with updated teal gradient colors
Clone/duplicate functionality works from UI and creates '(Copy)' suffix
REG round creation works with Q&A format (no MC options)
PPTX download functionality works and downloads .pptx files
All round type cards present and clickable (MC, REG, MISC, MYS, BIG)
Round saving and redirects work properly
All CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) work
